note: AFIR CELEX:32023R1804 URL resolves correctly (OJ L 234, 22 Sep 2023; applicable 13 Apr 2024). IEC 62196-2 (Type 2 AC connector) exists; latest edition 2025 at webstore.iec.ch/en/publication/86317, EN 62196-2 adopted. AFIR Art. 4 Type 2 mandate confirmed. GB/T 20234.2 vs IEC 62196-2 physical incompatibility is well-established. mandatory_status target correctly states ≥22 kW threshold for AFIR. Gap description is accurate.

Same AFIR source URL confirmed. IEC 62196-3 (CCS Combo 2 DC) exists; latest edition 2022 at webstore.iec.ch/en/publication/59923, with 2026 edition in progress. AFIR Annex II CCS2 mandate confirmed. GB/T 20234.3 DC incompatibility with CCS2 is established. GB/T 27930 CAN vs ISO 15118 PLC gap is correct. mandatory_status accurate.

SOURCE URL ERROR: source.url uses 'uri=OJ:L_202301804' which is a malformed OJ identifier. The correct EUR-Lex URL for AFIR is https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX%3A32023R1804 (OJ L 234, 22 Sep 2023). The current URL may still redirect but is not the canonical form. FIXED to CELEX form. Standards and mandatory_status are correct: AFIR is a Regulation (directly applicable, no transposition), applicable 13 Apr 2024. 'OJ L 2023/1804' cited in standards_or_laws is also non-standard notation; correct citation is OJ L 234, 22.9.2023.

LVD 2014/35/EU CELEX URL confirmed valid. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is confirmed as a harmonised standard under LVD providing presumption of conformity for EV conductive charging. GB/T 18487.1-2015 cited as CN equivalent is plausible (2023 revision now exists but 2015 was standard at dataset creation). Gap description and mandatory_status are accurate.

THREE ISSUES: (1) SOURCE URL ERROR: source.url 'https://webstore.iec.ch/en/publication/28357' does not correspond to IEC 61851-23 — the correct IEC webstore URL for IEC 61851-23:2014 is https://webstore.iec.ch/en/publication/6032. Publication 28357 does not match this standard. FIXED. (2) STANDARD REFERENCE ERROR: 'EN IEC 61851-23:2014+A1:2017' — no A1:2017 amendment to IEC 61851-23 is listed in IEC webstore; only COR1:2016 (corrigendum) exists for the 2014 edition. The 2023 edition (pub/32973) now supersedes 2014. EN 61851-23:2014 was last cited in EU OJ on 2019-11-27. For current CE conformity, EN IEC 61851-23:2023 should be cited, not 2014+A1:2017. (3) STATUS UNCERTAINTY: EN 61851-23:2014 is no longer in the current harmonised standards list per CE marking sources; the 2023 edition is the current version. mandatory_status target should reference the 2023 edition for active conformity.

SOURCE URL ERROR: source.url 'https://webstore.iec.ch/en/publication/60365' does not match IEC 60364-7-722 — the correct IEC webstore URL for IEC 60364-7-722:2018 is https://webstore.iec.ch/en/publication/29958. Publication 60365 is a different standard. FIXED. The standard IEC 60364-7-722:2018 is confirmed to exist. HD 60364-7-722 CENELEC adoption is stated as UNVERIFIED in the source data which is appropriate. Installation standard scope description is accurate. GB 50966-2014 and GB/T 51313-2018 CNequivalents are marked UNVERIFIED in source — appropriate caution.

SOURCE URL ERROR: source.url 'https://webstore.iec.ch/publication/62190' is an old-format URL (missing '/en/' path segment) and likely resolves to a 404 or redirect. The correct current IEC webstore URL for IEC 62955:2018 is https://webstore.iec.ch/en/publication/32963 (confirmed via IEC webstore search). FIXED. IEC/EN 62955:2018 standard confirmed to exist — it covers RDC-DD for mode 3 EV charging, rated ≤440 V AC, ≤125 A. The technical content describing Type B RCD / RDC-DD requirement under IEC 61851-1 and HD 60364-7-722 for DC fault protection is correct. UNVERIFIED flags in the source are appropriate.

SOURCE URL ERROR: source.url 'https://webstore.iec.ch/publication/60574' is an old-format URL AND uses the wrong publication number. IEC 60364-7-722:2018 is at pub/29958 (https://webstore.iec.ch/en/publication/29958); pub/60574 does not correspond to this standard (IEC 60574-2:1992 is an unrelated audiovisual standard at pub/16633). FIXED to pub/29958. Technical content about dual product/installation obligation under HD 60364-7-722 and IEC 61851-1 is correct. UNVERIFIED flags on CN standards are appropriate.

EMC Directive 2014/30/EU EUR-Lex URL (eli/dir/2014/30/oj/eng) is valid. EN IEC 61851-21-2:2021 is confirmed to exist and is published as a European standard adopted by CENELEC member bodies; OJ harmonisation citation is flagged UNVERIFIED in the source which is appropriate caution. GB/T 18487.2-2017 based on IEC 61851-21-2:2015 (older edition) is correct — the 2021 IEC edition introduced revised test levels. Gap analysis and mandatory_status are accurate.

Same EMC Directive URL confirmed valid. EN IEC 61000-3-2, EN IEC 61000-3-3, CISPR 11/EN 55011 series all confirmed as harmonised standards under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. CN equivalents (GB 17625.1-2022, GB 17625.2-2007, GB/T 17799.4-2022, GB 4824-2019) cited with appropriate UNVERIFIED flags where needed. Three structural gaps identified are technically accurate. CISPR 11 vs CISPR 32 applicability note is appropriately flagged UNVERIFIED.

LVD CELEX URL confirmed valid. LVD (2014/35/EU), EMCD (2014/30/EU), RED (2014/53/EU) CE marking framework correctly described. EN 61851-1 and EN IEC 61851-21-2 cited correctly. CCC vs CE structural difference is accurate. mandatory_status correct.

RED CELEX:32014L0053 EUR-Lex URL is valid. LVD Art.15, EMCD Art.14, RED Art.19 DoC obligations confirmed. Decision 768/2008/EC modular conformity assessment framework is correct. CNCA-C23-01 cited with appropriate UNVERIFIED flag. Gap analysis (CCC does not substitute for EU DoC) is accurate.

Regulation 2019/1020 CELEX:32019R1020 EUR-Lex URL confirmed valid. Art. 4 responsible economic operator obligation confirmed — four types of EU-established operators can fulfil this role (manufacturer, importer, authorised representative, fulfilment service provider). Mandatory for non-EU manufacturers without EU importer is accurate. Gap description correct.

AFIR CELEX URL valid. ISO 15118 parts (-1:2019, -2:2022, -20:2022) confirmed at ISO. OCPP 1.6/2.0.1 and OCPI 2.2.1 exist (OCA / EVRoaming Foundation). STATUS UNCERTAINTY: mandatory_status.target states 'phased timelines from 2024-2027 ' and the '≥150 kW ISO 15118 PnC from 2025' threshold is marked this requires direct reading of AFIR Annex II to confirm exact power thresholds and dates. A 2025 European Parliament question (E-002254/2025) confirms ISO 15118 PnC is referenced in AFIR implementing acts, suggesting the mandate is real but exact dates need verification against AFIR Annex II / delegated acts. needs_human flagged for date/threshold confirmation.

AFIR CELEX URL valid. ISO 15118-1:2019, ISO 15118-2:2022, ISO 15118-20:2022 all confirmed at ISO. OCPP 1.6/2.0.1 confirmed. EN 50549-1/-2:2019 confirmed as CENELEC standards (A1:2023 amendment now exists for EN 50549-1). GB/T 27930-2015 CN equivalent correctly identified as incompatible with ISO 15118. STATUS UNCERTAINTY: mandatory_status.target marked 'conditional ' for ISO 15118 AFIR rollout dates — this is appropriate. A 2025 EP question confirms ISO 15118 PnC is subject to AFIR implementing acts. V2G OCPP-mandatory-by-operator-contract-not-EU-law distinction is correctly noted.

While the URL likely resolves and the content is correct, for regulatory verification purposes this should reference the official CENELEC publication or IEC webstore. EN 50549-1:2019 is confirmed as a real CENELEC standard; EN 50549-1:2019/A1:2023 amendment exists. EU Commission Regulation 2016/631 (NC RfG) reference is correct. ISO 15118-20:2022 confirmed. CN V2G standards (GB/T 40429-2021, GB/T 34657) marked UNVERIFIED appropriately. EN 50549 harmonisation status under specific Directive flagged appropriate.
